name: Infantry Training Master
descriptionTemplate: Reduce the damage taken by X% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.

progression.renderedDesc: Reduce the damage taken by 1% per level based on the level of the elite force infantry under command. Elite Force Infantry does not lose attack power when their HP is reduced.
